strengths: Strong SQL and query optimization experience
Hands-on Tableau and Power BI dashboard development
Data governance and quality controls implemented
weaknesses: Less than 5 years in formal data management roles at timeframes
No higher-education or nonprofit sector experience noted
improvement_bullets: Optimized data extraction within Salesforce environments by leveraging SQL and exploring SOQL syntax to streamline reporting for CRM-integrated systems.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate advancement business needs into actionable insights, including tracking donor engagement, prospect stages, and moves management pipelines.
Developed robust data documentation and technical requirements for automated reporting workflows, ensuring high-quality data governance and adherence to organizational business logic.
Utilized Python and JavaScript-based logic to enhance data visualization interactivity in Tableau, increasing dashboard adoption and accessibility for non-technical stakeholders.
Maintained rigorous data reconciliation and validation processes to ensure alignment between Salesforce CRM data and downstream reporting outputs.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Advancement Data Analyst opportunity with The New School. I am interested in this opportunity because of The New School's commitment to interdisciplinary innovation and its unique position as a global center for creative and social research. What interests me about working for The New School is its progressive approach to education, which inspires me because I am passionate about leveraging data to support institutions that drive meaningful societal impact. I believe my advanced proficiency in SQL and Tableau and my experience in data governance and automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data integrity and stakeholder alignment. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was creating data mismatches and inefficiency. I architected new Power BI and Looker workflows and standardized organizational KPIs, which reduced report discrepancies and improved work efficiency by 40%. Ultimately, I know that the Advancement Data Analyst role at The New School would allow me to bring my expertise in data modeling to the crucial work of fundraising strategy and donor engagement. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my skills in database optimization and cross-functional collaboration. I collaborated with a 14-person team to align features with business objectives and optimized relational database queries, which improved data accuracy by 60%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and CRM-integrated reporting to support the Development and Alumni Engagement teams at The New School. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data-driven decision-making align with what it takes to succeed in the Advancement Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
